name: get_vacuous_precondition
reason: If all KeyIterators are always at end, get() can never be called and its ensures is never tested

name: is_end_always_true
reason: If is_end always returns true then no KeyIterator ever holds a valid key, making all key-based operations unreachable

name: is_end_always_false
reason: If is_end always returns false then the end-of-iteration sentinel is unrepresentable, breaking termination of key iteration

name: new_delegation_map_empty
code:
proof fn phi_4_new_delegation_map_empty<K: KeyTrait + VerusClone>(k_zero: K, id_zero: ID, k: K)
    requires
        k_zero == K::zero_spec(),
        id_zero@.valid_physical_address(),
    ensures
        Map::<K, AbstractEndPoint>::total(|k: K| id_zero@)[k] != id_zero@,
{
}
reason: If the total map disagrees with id_zero@ at any key, new()'s ensures that every key maps to id_zero@ would be contradictory or wrong

name: new_valid_implies_lows_empty
reason: If the backing lows map is empty after construction, the invariant that lows contains zero_spec() is violated, meaning valid() is trivially false or broken
